Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights
Off Calendar May-23-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC'S Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights is Off calendar. Dismissal of entire action filed on May 20, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights
Off Calendar May-18-2022 Continued To May-23-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ALISA KIM, Esq. of G&B Law, LLP (Tel: 818-382-6200) for petitioner;
No other appearances made in this case.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear.

The Court grants petitioner's request to continue today's hearing to May 23, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302.

The Court informs counsel that counsel should be prepared to address the high discount rate.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
